description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in Web4Future eDating Professional 5 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the (1) s, (2) pg, and (3) sortb parameters to (a) index.php; (4) cid parameter to (b) gift.php and (c) fq.php; and (5) cat parameter to (d) articles.php.
references:

http://secunia.com/advisories/17879
http://www.vupen.com/english/advisories/2005/2734
http://www.osvdb.org/21419
http://www.osvdb.org/21418
http://www.securityfocus.com/bid/15715
http://www.osvdb.org/21421
http://www.osvdb.org/21420
https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2005-4034
